subject: english
text:
Cap seller - going to market - felt tired - slept under a tree - a basket - caps for sale - monkeys on the tree -
came down - opened the basket - took the caps - wore them - started making noise – Cap seller woke up - no
cap in the basket - looked up in wonder - monkeys wearing caps - tried several methods to collect the caps -
failed - out of frustration threw his cap - monkeys also threw the caps - Cap seller collected the caps and
went always happily.

subject: english
text:
Given below is a profile of Dr. Ashok Pai. Write a paragraph using the  clues given below.  
Born:                             30th December 1946
Studied:                       Human Psychology
Occupation:                Psychiatrist
Special interest:         Film production
Founded:                    Manasa nursing Home and Manasa
education foundation in Shimoga.
Died:                       29th September 2016.
.X.Read the passage and answer the questions that follow   
A child playing on the street was hit by a speeding vehicle. The child was lying in a pool of blood. It
was shifted to the hospital. The doctors who examined the child told its parents that the child needed
immediate blood transfusion and they must arrange for 4 bottles of blood immediately. The eager parents
offered good money for buying a blood, many and men did give blood but non accepted the money offered.
They bluntly told the parents that blood could not be bought with the money and that it should be donated by
one person to another.
A)  Why did young man refuse to take money?
B)  What did the doctors tell the parents?

A child playing on the street was hit by a speeding vehicle. The child was lying in a pool of blood. It
was shifted to the hospital. The doctors who examined the child told its parents that the child needed
immediate blood transfusion and they must arrange for 4 bottles of blood immediately. The eager parents
offered good money for buying a blood, many and men did give blood but non accepted the money offered.
They bluntly told the parents that blood could not be bought with the money and that it should be donated by
one person to another.
A)  Why did young man refuse to take money?

for helping poor children.

text:
Once a foolish King lay dying. He said he was at death door. But the real fact that he felt was suffering
from having nothing to do. That was the cause he was being bored to death. He suffered pain in every
muscle and bone in his body. Physicians and surgeons came from far and wide. They examined him
thoroughly, but they could not find anything wrong.

subject: english
text:
What was the king suffering from?
2 .One day a messenger saw a stable boy who was singing happily. He enquired the boy what made him sing
so merrily. He replied that he loved his fellow man and he owned a little, but wanted less. Therefore, he was
a happy man and liked to sing. The Messenger exclaimed that there he found the happy man.
He told the boy that the king was ill and he needed to sleep one night in the shirt of a happy man . He
ordered him to give his shirt, but the boy instead of giving his coat ran  away to the palace and went right
into the royal bedchamber. The king asked him what work he had there to come in. The boy told him that
the cure for his ill was right there. He said he loved his fellow man owned   but a little and wanted less, but
he did not possess a shirt. On hearing the boy the king hung his head ashamed. He agreed that the cure had
been here and could cure his own folly .He  decided then and there to be good king, to rule wisely and well.
